testcase.name: test_pricing_catalog_includes_topups

failure.message: AssertionError: missing pricing for topup_small assert 'topup_small' in {'premium': {'amount_minor': 399900, 'charge_amount': 3999.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}, 'pro': {'amount_minor': 149900, 'charge_amount': 1499.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}, 'starter': {'amount_minor': 49900, 'charge_amount': 499.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}, 'ultimate': {'amount_minor': 999900, 'charge_amount': 9999.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_economics_reset.py:134: in test_pricing_catalog_includes_topups assert pid in prices, f"missing pricing for {pid}" E AssertionError: missing pricing for topup_small E assert 'topup_small' in {'premium': {'amount_minor': 399900, 'charge_amount': 3999.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}, 'pro': {'amount_minor': 149900, 'charge_amount': 1499.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}, 'starter': {'amount_minor': 49900, 'charge_amount': 499.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}, 'ultimate': {'amount_minor': 999900, 'charge_amount': 9999.0, 'charge_currency': 'INR', 'country_code': 'IN', ...}}
